name: Mom's Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb To 2 lb ground beef, or ground turkey
recipeInstructions:
You may make this sauce with meat or with sausage or both if you really want to. The way you do it depends on what you want to do with it or what you like.
For SAUSAGE start like this:
1. In your pot, brown sausages very well and remove from the pot.
2. Add 1/4 cup of oil to the pot.
3. Add two large onions diced fine (not minced).
4. Add five to six cloves of minced garlic (or to your taste) to the oil dripping on the onion.
5. Very, very slowly brown onions, stirring often. Do not let it burn or the sauce will taste burned.
For MEAT start like this:
1. Add 1/4 cup of oil to the pot.
2. Add two large onions diced fine (not minced).
3. Add five to six cloves of minced garlic (or to your taste) to the oil dripping on the onion.
4. Very, very slowly brown onions, stirring often. Do not let it burn or the sauce will taste burned.
Continue here:
1. To the pot, add two cans of tomato paste and four cans of tomato sauce.
2. Fill one paste can with water and rinse out both paste cans. Add to the pot.
3. Fill one sauce can with water and rinse out all four sauce cans. Add to the pot.
4. Stir well.
5. If you cooked the sausages, replace them into the sauce now.
6. Add Sweet Basil, Italian Seasoning, and Parsley. Stir well.
7. Add black pepper and 1/2 to 1 tsp of salt. Stir and taste.
8. Bring to a boil (uncovered) then turn down the heat and simmer for about four (4) hours or until you can't wait any longer. It's best to cook the sauce for at least two (2) hours to get the flavors to start to blend. Stir every 30 minutes or so.
ENJOY!
